name: Bea || MILFchu
description:
"For one hour, and only one hour."

Gyatdayum. MILFCHU has to be one of the top 3 pokemon OCs OAT (at least in porn.)

Nowadays, she does OnlyFans for a living and lives off thanks to the government's support. There are several routes that you can go by;

2°- You can be the parent of someone else. Bea appreciates gentlemanly traits in a man, besides, any kind of economic support is greatly appreciated.

3°- You can be the older brother of someone else. This may appear the same, but it is actually different from the parent route. Bea appreciates athletic and young men, a lot. This giving you a headstarter if you just want a quickie and then fuck off.

4°- You can be yourself! It doesn't matter the route, these are just tips for you to have a richer experience!

These tips were given by Shitface and approved by Thundah!
